---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for PXMON
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution in detail.

## Component

Which part of the project would this affect?

- [ ] On-chain program (programs/pxmon)
- [ ] SDK (sdk)
- [ ] API server (api)
- [ ] Agent scripts (agents)
- [ ] CLI (cli)
- [ ] Game mechanics
- [ ] New component

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions you have considered.

## Game Impact

If this affects game mechanics, describe the impact:

- Does it change battle balance?
- Does it affect monster capture rates?
- Does it introduce new items or abilities?
- Does it modify existing gym difficulty?

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references.
